violations.description: API ATDD coverage validates success/refusal envelopes but does not assert system error envelope behavior from live API.
violations.suggestion: Add API case asserting canonical `error` envelope semantics and deterministic UI metadata contract where applicable.
violations.code_snippet: [P1] success and refusal envelopes expose deterministic accessible feedback metadata

violations.description: Suite lacks explicit unauthorized/forbidden outbound action checks for non-member role or org-unit mismatch.
violations.suggestion: Add one negative access-control test path for outbound send/call endpoints.
violations.code_snippet: // no dedicated 403/401 ux-r4 assertion in ATDD suite

violations.description: Invalid override reason path is present in automate expansion but not in core ux-r4 ATDD suite.

violations.code_snippet: [P1] nested override payload fields are accepted ...

Promote one invalid override rejection case into ATDD baseline
summary: Coverage is strong for AC1-AC4 core behavior; a few negative-path API contract cases are still missing.
